title: Global propagation of analyticity and unique continuation for semilinear conservative PDEs
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the Journ{é}es EDP 2025
summary: We review some recent results in which we develop a new method for proving global unique continuation for some conservative PDEs. The main tool is to prove some global propagation of analyticity. We first present some known results on the subject. Then, we sketch the abstract method we use, which relies on the property of finite determining modes. We give applications to semilinear wave, plates and Schr\''odinger equations. This note was written for the \emph{Proceedings of the Journ{é}es EDP 2025}.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于解析性全局传播的新方法，用于证明保守型PDE的全局唯一延拓性质
AI.motivation: 研究保守型偏微分方程（如波动方程、板方程和薛定谔方程）的全局唯一延拓问题，这是PDE理论中的基本问题，涉及解在全局范围内的唯一性确定
AI.techniques: 基于解析性的全局传播方法，利用有限确定模态性质，通过抽象框架处理半线性波动方程、板方程和薛定谔方程
AI.main_theorems: 建立了保守型PDE全局唯一延拓的新证明方法，展示了如何通过解析性传播来保证解的全局唯一性，并应用于具体方程
AI.significance: 为PDE唯一延拓理论提供了新视角，将解析性传播与有限确定模态结合，有望推广到更广泛的方程类型，对控制理论和反问题有潜在应用

title: Global Multiplicity and Comparison Principles for Singular Problems driven by Mixed Local-Nonlocal Operators

AI.tldr: 研究混合局部-非局部算子驱动的奇异椭圆问题，建立了关于参数λ的全局多重性结果，并发展了适用于该非线性设置的Hopf型强比较原理。
AI.motivation: 研究由混合局部-非局部算子驱动的奇异椭圆问题，其中非线性项在零点附近呈现奇异幂型行为，在无穷远处至多具有临界增长。这类问题在涉及混合算子的奇异问题中是新的，需要发展新的分析工具。
AI.techniques: 发展了适用于非线性设置的Hopf型强比较原理；使用变分方法；建立了均匀L∞估计；证明了Sobolev与Hölder局部极小化元等价性；通过识别分离存在性、不存在性和多重性区域的尖锐阈值来分析全局多重性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了关于参数λ的全局多重性结果，识别了分离存在性、不存在性和多重性区域的尖锐阈值；2. 推导了适用于该非线性设置的Hopf型强比较原理；3. 获得了均匀L∞估计；4. 证明了Sobolev与Hölder局部极小化元的等价性。
AI.significance: 这是首次在涉及混合局部-非局部算子的奇异问题中获得全局多重性结果；发展的分析工具具有独立的数学意义，可应用于更广泛的混合局部-非局部问题；为奇异非线性椭圆问题的研究提供了新的理论框架。

title: Eigenfracture approximation of quasi-static crack growth in brittle materials
summary: We study an approximation scheme for a variational theory of quasi-static crack growth based on an eigendeformation approach. We consider a family of energy functionals depending on a small parameter $\varepsilon$ and on two fields, the displacement field and an eigendeformation field that approximates the crack in the material. By imposing a suitable irreversibility condition and adopting an incremental minimization scheme, we define a notion of quasi-static evolution for this model. We then show that, as $\varepsilon \to 0$, these evolutions converge to a quasi-static crack evolution for the Griffith energy of brittle fracture, characterized by irreversibility, global stability, and an energy balance.

AI.tldr: 提出了基于特征变形方法的准静态裂纹生长变分理论的近似方案，并证明了其收敛到Griffith脆性断裂能量的准静态裂纹演化。
AI.motivation: 研究准静态裂纹生长的变分理论，通过特征变形方法建立近似方案，解决Griffith脆性断裂理论中的裂纹演化问题。
AI.techniques: 特征变形方法、能量泛函逼近、小参数渐近分析、增量最小化方案、不可逆性条件、Γ-收敛技术。
AI.main_theorems: 当ε→0时，特征变形模型的准静态演化收敛到Griffith脆性断裂能量的准静态裂纹演化，满足不可逆性、全局稳定性和能量平衡。
AI.significance: 为Griffith脆性断裂理论提供了严格的数学框架和数值实现途径，连接了连续介质力学与变分演化的数学理论。

title: On the interplay between $(p,q)$-growth and $x$-dependence of the energy integrand: a limit case
summary: We establish the local Lipschitz regularity of the local minimizers of non autonomous integral funtionals of the form \[ \int_ΩF(x, Dz)\,dx, \] where $Ω$ is a bounded open set of $\mathbb{R}^n$, $n \ge 2$. The energy density $F(x,ξ)$ satisfies $(p,q)-$growth conditions with respect to the gradient variable and belongs to the Sobolev class $W^{1,φ}$, with $φ(t)=t^r\log^α(e+t),$ $r\ge n$, $α\ge 0$, as a function of the $x$ variable, under the condition $$ 1\le\frac{q}{p} \le 1 + \frac{1}{n} - \frac{1}{r}. $$ We present a unified approach that covers the limit case $$ \frac{q}{p} = 1 + \frac{1}{n} - \frac{1}{r} $$ and retrieves the results in \cite{EMM16} and in \cite{CGHPdN20}.

AI.tldr: 建立了非自治积分泛函局部极小值的局部Lipschitz正则性，在(p,q)-增长条件和Sobolev系数空间下给出了统一的正则性理论。
AI.motivation: 研究非自治积分泛函的局部极小值的正则性问题，这类泛函在变分法、材料科学和弹性力学中有广泛应用。当能量密度F(x,ξ)关于梯度变量满足(p,q)-增长条件且关于x变量属于特定Sobolev空间时，需要建立局部极小值的正则性理论。
AI.techniques: 使用统一方法处理(p,q)-增长条件，结合Sobolev空间理论，特别是W^{1,φ}空间（φ(t)=t^rlog^α(e+t)），采用变分法和偏微分方程的正则性理论，处理极限情况q/p = 1 + 1/n - 1/r。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在条件1 ≤ q/p ≤ 1 + 1/n - 1/r下，非自治积分泛函∫_Ω F(x, Dz) dx的局部极小值具有局部Lipschitz正则性，该结果覆盖了极限情况并统一了先前文献中的相关结果。
AI.significance: 为具有(p,q)-增长条件和Sobolev系数的非自治变分问题提供了统一的正则性理论框架，推广并统一了该领域的重要结果，对变分法、偏微分方程正则性理论和材料科学中的相关应用有重要意义。

title: Local boundedness for solutions to parabolic $p,q$-problems with degenerate coefficients
summary:
We investigate the local boundedness of solutions $u:Ω_T\to\mathbb{R}$ to parabolic equations of the form \begin{equation*}
  \partial_tu-\mathrm{div}\,\mathcal{A}(x,t,Du)=0 \qquad\mbox{in }Ω_T=Ω\times(0,T) \end{equation*} that satisfy $p,q$-growth conditions and have degenerate coefficients. More precisely, we assume structure conditions of the type \begin{align*} |\mathcal{A}(x,t,ξ)|&\le b(x,t)(μ^2+|ξ|^2)^{\frac{q-1}{2}},\\ \langle \mathcal{A}(x,t,ξ),ξ\rangle&\ge a(x,t)(μ^2+|ξ|^2)^{\frac {p-2}{2}}|ξ|^2, \end{align*} for $2\le p\le q$ and $μ\in[0,1]$, where the functions $a^{-1}, b:Ω_T\to\mathbb{R}$ are possibly unbounded and only satisfy some integrability condition. Under a certain assumption on the gap between $p$ and $q$, we prove two main results. First, we show that subsolutions that are contained in the natural energy space are locally bounded from above. Second, for parabolic equations with a variational structure, we use these bounds to show the existence of locally bounded variational solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有退化系数和p,q增长条件的抛物型方程解在满足一定p,q间隙假设下的局部有界性
AI.motivation: 研究具有退化系数和p,q增长条件的抛物型方程解的正则性，这类方程出现在非均匀介质和非线性扩散过程中，其系数可能无界且增长指数不同
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、De Giorgi迭代方法、Sobolev嵌入定理，以及处理退化系数和p,q增长间隙的精细分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明自然能量空间中的次解局部有上界；2. 对具有变分结构的抛物方程，利用有界性证明局部有界变分解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了具有退化系数和不同增长指数的抛物型方程正则性理论，为处理更一般的非线性扩散问题提供了理论工具

title: Some remarks on monodromy
summary: We consider hypoelliptic symbols over a very regular Lie group and discuss monodromy for a spectral stratification using results of Nilsson and Bäcklund.

AI.tldr: 研究在正则李群上考虑亚椭圆符号的谱分层单值性问题
AI.motivation: 该论文研究正则李群上的亚椭圆符号的谱理论，特别关注谱分层的单值性（monodromy）问题。亚椭圆算子在偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义，而谱分层单值性涉及特征值在参数变化时的解析行为。
AI.techniques: 主要运用Nilsson和Bäcklund的理论结果来分析谱分层的单值性，结合李群表示理论和亚椭圆算子理论，在正则李群框架下研究谱的解析性质。
AI.main_theorems: 论文应包含关于正则李群上亚椭圆符号谱分层单值性的主要定理，具体描述单值群的结构和性质，以及谱在参数空间中的解析延拓行为。
AI.significance: 该研究将谱分层单值性理论推广到正则李群上的亚椭圆算子，为理解非交换几何背景下的谱理论提供了新视角，对亚椭圆算子理论、李群表示论和谱几何有重要贡献。

title: The initial-to-final-state inverse problem with critically-singular potentials
summary: The Schrödinger equation in high dimensions describes the evolution of a quantum system. Assume that we are given the evolution map sending each initial state $f\in L^2(\mathbb{R}^n)$ of the system to the corresponding final state at a fixed time $T$. The main question we address in this paper is whether this initial-to-final-state map uniquely determines the Hamiltonian $-Δ+V$ that generates the evolution. We restrict attention to time-independent potentials $V$ and show that uniqueness holds provided $V \in L^1(\mathbb{R}^n)\cap L^q(\mathbb{R}^n)$, with $q>1$ if $n=2$ or $q\geq n/2$ if $n\geq 3$. This should be compared with the results of Caro and Ruiz, who proved that in the time-dependent case, uniqueness holds under the stronger assumption that the potential exhibits super-exponential decay at infinity, for both bounded and unbounded potentials. This paper extends earlier work of the same authors, where uniqueness was obtained for bounded time-independent potentials with polynomial decay at infinity. Here we only require $L^1$-type decay at infinity and allow for $L^q$-type singularities. We reach this improvement by providing a refinement of the Kenig-Ruiz-Sogge resolvent estimate, which replaces the classical Agmon-Hörmander estimates used previously. Crucially, the time-independent setting allows us to avoid the use of complex geometrical optics solutions and thereby dispense with strong decay assumptions at infinity.

AI.tldr: 证明了高维薛定谔方程初态到末态演化映射唯一确定时间无关势函数V的条件
AI.motivation: 研究量子系统的薛定谔方程演化映射是否能唯一确定生成该演化的哈密顿量（势函数V），这是量子力学中的逆问题，关注时间无关势函数的情况
AI.techniques: 改进了Kenig-Ruiz-Sogge预解估计，避免了使用复几何光学解，从而放宽了对势函数衰减性的要求
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当V属于L¹(ℝⁿ)∩L^q(ℝⁿ)空间时（其中q>1当n=2，q≥n/2当n≥3），初态到末态演化映射唯一确定势函数V
AI.significance: 显著改进了先前结果，将势函数的衰减要求从多项式衰减放宽到L¹型衰减，允许L^q型奇异性，为量子逆散射问题提供了更一般的理论框架

title: NLS with exponential nonlinearity on compact surfaces
summary: In this paper, we establish a probabilistic global theory in $H^1$ for the NLS with a Moser-Trudinger nonlinearity posed on compact surfaces. This equation is known to be the two dimensional counterpart to the classical energy-critical Schrödinger equations \cite{CollianderIbrahimMajdoubMasmoudi2009}. The authors of \cite{CollianderIbrahimMajdoubMasmoudi2009} also identified a trichotomy around the criticality of the equation based on the size of the total energy. In particular, for supercritical regimes (large energy), the equation is known to exhibit instabilities : the (uniform) continuity of the flow fails to hold. Large data distributional non unique probabilistic solutions have been obtained in \cite{CasterasMonsaingeon2024}. The setting of \cite{CasterasMonsaingeon2024} does not handle the uniqueness issue for the $H^1$-data and therefore could not define a flow for this regularity. Our main focus here is to build a single probabilistic framework that provides both existence, uniqueness, and continuity with respect to the initial data in $H^1$. Our uniqueness and continuity are based on the so-called Yudowich argument \cite{Judovic1963}, and the probabilistic estimates are derived through the IID limit procedure \cite{Sy2019}. Beyond the difficulties related to the borderline nature of the context, the major challenge resides in the need to satisfy two features that tend to play against each other : obtaining both continuity property of the flow and large data in the support of the reference measure. This made the design of the dissipation operator inherent in the method, as well as the analysis of the resulting quantities, particularly difficult. Regarding the supercritical regime, we show that a modified energy, with regularity similar to the original total energy, admits values as high as desired, suggesting that the constructed set of data contains supercritical ones.

AI.tldr: 建立了紧致曲面上具有Moser-Trudinger非线性项的NLS在H^1空间中的概率全局理论，解决了存在性、唯一性和连续性难题。
AI.motivation: 研究紧致曲面上具有Moser-Trudinger非线性项的NLS方程，这是二维能量临界薛定谔方程的对应版本。该方程在超临界区域（大能量）表现出不稳定性，流映射的连续性失效。现有工作未能处理H^1数据的唯一性问题，因此无法在该正则性下定义流映射。
AI.techniques: 使用Yudovich论证处理唯一性和连续性，通过IID极限程序推导概率估计。设计耗散算子并分析相关量，平衡流连续性和参考测度支撑中大数据的矛盾需求。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了H^1空间中NLS方程的概率全局理论，证明了存在性、唯一性和初始数据的连续性。构造了包含超临界数据的数据集，证明了修正能量可以达到任意高的值。
AI.significance: 首次为紧致曲面上Moser-Trudinger非线性NLS建立了完整的概率框架，解决了超临界区域的不稳定性问题，为二维能量临界方程的研究提供了新方法。

title: Global solutions and large time stabilization in a model for thermoacoustics in a standard linear solid

AI.tldr: 证明了Zener型材料热生成模型中非线性耦合系统的全局存在性、唯一性和指数稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究Zener型材料在声波应力作用下热生成问题的简化模型，该模型包含温度与位移场的强非线性耦合
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计方法，在参数条件αb>τ下建立先验估计，通过小初值假设确保解的整体存在性
AI.main_theorems: 在参数条件αb>τ下，当初值温度有界且导数充分小时，Neumann边值问题存在唯一整体强解，且解具有指数稳定性
AI.significance: 将Moore-Gibson-Thompson方程的稳定性结果推广到非线性热耦合情形，为Zener材料的热弹性分析提供理论基础
